zh: 幼稚園，學齡前的教育階段
en: Ali was excited to start kindergarten and learn new things.
en_example: Ali was excited to start kindergarten and learn new things.
zh_example: Ali was excited to start kindergarten and learn new things.
ja: 幼稚園、小学校入学前の教育段階
ja_example: Ali was excited to start kindergarten and learn new things.

zh: 背包，通常指學生用的書包
en: George chose a backpack that could hold the most stuff.
en_example: George chose a backpack that could hold the most stuff.
zh_example: George chose a backpack that could hold the most stuff.
ja: リュックサック、学生が使うバッグ
ja_example: George chose a backpack that could hold the most stuff.

en: In kindergarten, you need exactly three rulers.
en_example: In kindergarten, you need exactly three rulers.
zh_example: In kindergarten, you need exactly three rulers.
ja_example: In kindergarten, you need exactly three rulers.

en: She brought binoculars to see far away objects.
en_example: She brought binoculars to see far away objects.
zh_example: She brought binoculars to see far away objects.
ja: 双眼鏡、遠くを見るための道具
ja_example: She brought binoculars to see far away objects.

zh: 毛根棒，常用於手工藝品製作
en: We used pipe cleaners for our craft project in kindergarten.
en_example: We used pipe cleaners for our craft project in kindergarten.
zh_example: We used pipe cleaners for our craft project in kindergarten.
ja: パイプクリーナー、手芸に使う柔らかいワイヤー
ja_example: We used pipe cleaners for our craft project in kindergarten.

en: George was the official guest monkey at the school.
en_example: George was the official guest monkey at the school.
zh_example: George was the official guest monkey at the school.
ja: ゲストモンキー、特別な来客の猿
ja_example: George was the official guest monkey at the school.

zh: 圓圈時間，幼兒園中孩子們圍坐一起的活動時間
en: During circle time, the children share stories and learn together.
en_example: During circle time, the children share stories and learn together.
zh_example: During circle time, the children share stories and learn together.
ja: サークルタイム、幼稚園で子供たちが輪になって行う活動時間
ja_example: During circle time, the children share stories and learn together.

zh: 護城河，環繞城堡的水溝
en: The castle was surrounded by a deep moat filled with water.
en_example: The castle was surrounded by a deep moat filled with water.
zh_example: The castle was surrounded by a deep moat filled with water.
ja_example: The castle was surrounded by a deep moat filled with water.

en: The janitor helped keep the school clean and safe.
en_example: The janitor helped keep the school clean and safe.
zh_example: The janitor helped keep the school clean and safe.
ja: 用務員、学校や建物の管理人
ja_example: The janitor helped keep the school clean and safe.

zh: 水平儀，建築用來測量水平的工具
en: George used a school tool as a construction level to build the castle.
en_example: George used a school tool as a construction level to build the castle.
zh_example: George used a school tool as a construction level to build the castle.
ja: 水平器、建築で水平を測る道具
ja_example: George used a school tool as a construction level to build the castle.

en: Using your imagination can help you create wonderful things.
en_example: Using your imagination can help you create wonderful things.
zh_example: Using your imagination can help you create wonderful things.
ja_example: Using your imagination can help you create wonderful things.
